meta.title: 63: your new favourite party game
meta.description: 63 is a party word-guessing game. Two teams, 63-second turns, three rounds. Free on iOS and Android, with packs.63.pt for building your own decks.

hero.sub: One phone, two teams. Get your team to guess as many cards as you can — 63 seconds at a time.

how.lead: Teams take turns getting their teammates to guess cards but with each round the rules change.

rounds.title: Say (almost) anything.
rounds.body: You can't use the words from the card's title, but everything else is fair game.
rounds.clue: "Christmas movie about being left solo in a house… with Macaulay Culkin!"

rounds.title: Only one word.
rounds.body: No gestures, no sounds, no title words. You get exactly one word to nail it.

rounds.title: No words at all.
rounds.body: Gestures and sounds only. By now you know every card — good luck miming it.

make.lead: Inside jokes, your friend group, a stag night deck. Write cards in the browser, co-write with friends, and share with a link.

features.title: Create
features.body: Write your own cards in the browser. Set difficulty, add descriptions, pick an icon and a language for the pack.

features.title: Collaborate
features.body: Write with as many people as you want — everyone adds cards in real time, and you control who can edit and who can just view.

features.title: Share
features.body: Send your pack to a friend with a link, or publish it for everyone — it opens straight in the app, and likes and play counts roll back to you.

community.lead: Decks made by the community, in multiple languages, with new ones landing all the time. Add as many as you like and mix them into the same game.
community.free: Every pack is free. No paywalls.

final.title: Download now.
final.sub: Free on iOS and Android. No accounts, no paywalls.

footer.blurb:
Your new favourite party game.
Made in Porto 🇵🇹
footer.packsBlurb: Write your own decks in the browser and share them with your friends.
